LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -APPEAR:JERRY H. LANGER FOR PLTF/X-DEFTS & MOVING PARTIES; SHELLY C. LYON FOR DEFT/X-COMPLAINANT & OPPOSING PARTY. DEMURRER - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD BREACH OF CONTRACT. CAUSE OF ACTION CURRENTLY CONVOLUTED GIVEN REFERENCE TO MULTIPLE CONTRACTS, SOME OF WHICH INCLUDE ARBITRATION CLAUSES. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO TRADE SECRET MISAPPROPRIATION. "MISAPPROPRIATION" NOT PROPERLY PLEADED GIVEN THAT BOTH PARTIES OWN THE ALLEGED SECRETS. SEE CC 3246.1. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 5 AND 12 [UNFAIR COMPETITION] TO PLEAD CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER B&P 17200. OVERRULE AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 [TORTIOUS INTERFERENCE]. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION [LIBEL/SLANDER] TO IDENTIFY FALSE STATEMENT OF FACT. MOTION TO STRIKE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT GIVEN THAT X-COMPLAINANT IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION. MR. LANGER TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR: 8620, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON, DEPT. 302

JERRY H. LANGER,ESQ. 415/546-9113 FOR PLANT.OPPOSING PARTY

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING; DEMURRER-OVERRULE 1. AS TO 1ST, 6HT, 11TH, 13TH & 14TH CAUSE OF ACTIONS

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jerry H. Langer, Esq. 546-9113 for pltf/x-defts & moving parties; Shelly C. Lyon, Esq. 394-5500 for deft/x-complainant & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (Demurrer - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD BREACH OF CONTRACT. CAUSE OF ACTION CURRENTLY CONVOLUTED GIVEN REFERENCE TO MULTIPLE CONTRACTS, SOME OF WHICH INCLUDE ARBITRATION CLAUSES. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO TRADE SECRET MISAPPROPRIATION. "MISAPPROPRIATION" NOT PROPERLY PLEADED GIVEN THAT BOTH PARTIES OWN THE ALLEGED SECRETS. See CC 3246.1. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 5 AND 12 [UNFAIR COMPETITION] TO PLEAD CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER B&P 17200. OVERRULE AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 [TORTIOUS INTERFERENCE]. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION [LIBEL/SLANDER] TO IDENTIFY FALSE STATEMENT OF FACT.
Motion to Strike = OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT GIVEN THAT X-COMPLAINANT IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION). Mr. Langer to prepare order. (AJR/PB)
